transcript.text: If you hire an animator and you know for sure that he's going to stay for a year and he's going to generate you like $120,000, even paying 5K for him, it's still a good deal, right? There's no asset like that in the world that you can pay 5K right now and then get 12K per month [music] on average for the next year. It's crazy.
